form.formComment: Won his last three in a row including a strong win last start racing on the pace over 457m at this track by 4.5 lengths in a Restricted WIN. In sparkling form and can win again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.22) at Capalaba in a Restricted WIN, finishing seventh and beaten 6 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Looks a leading chance.
